---
title: "Pangenome plots"
output: null_document
---


```{r}

library(pannagram)
library(ggplot2)

```


```{r}
stop("Define!")
path_ptoject = ''
```

# Panplot
```{r}
p = panplot(path.project, i.chr = 5, aln.type = 'extra2',wnd.size = )
savePNG(p, path="../images", name = 'panplot', width = 5, height = 4)
```



# StntenyDot
```{r}
p = syntenyplot(path.project = path.project, acc = 'GCA_000008865.2', ref='GCA_000005845.2')
p
savePNG(p, path="../images", name = 'syntenyplot', width = 4, height = 4)
```

# Pan Growth
```{r}
p = pangrowth(path.project=path.project, acc='6909', i.chr=1, aln.type='extra2')
p

savePNG(p, path="../images", name = 'pangrowth', width = 5, height = 4)
```
